demographics.living_situation: lives in a private residence; was home alone when the pain started

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a sharp, grabbing pain in my lower right side that keeps catching me, and I'm terrified my appendix is bursting.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on this evening and it's sharp and keeps catching me on the lower right side — I'm scared it's my appendix and I don't know whether I need to go to hospital.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 8 hours ago as a dull ache around my belly button
symptom_narrative.character: it began as a vague central ache and then moved down and settled in my lower right side as sharp, grabbing cramps that come and go
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the sharp catches are quite bad when they come, but it eases off in between — I'm lying curled up on my side because that feels better
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower right side of my tummy now; it started up near my belly button
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in sharp waves rather than being there constantly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still curled up on my side, and it settles a bit between the waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the sharp twinges seem to catch me randomly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been to the toilet twice this evening with loose, unformed motions
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get twinges like this in the same spot on and off, and loose motions now and then — but this evening it's sharper than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've had to stop what I was doing and lie down curled up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had a grumbling gut for years — I was told it's a long-standing inflammation in my bowel that flares up now and then
past_medical_history.how_managed: mostly just watch what I eat and take the occasional paracetamol

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: just now and then when I get the twinges

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was at home on her own this evening; has easy access to a bathroom

objective_data_offered.value: 37.2 degrees on my home thermometer, I don't feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: I'm lying on my side curled up because that's more comfortable, and I feel a bit anxious
two loose, unformed motions this evening — no blood that I've seen
